title: Tj
compiled_truth: Tj is an external contact at [Haas](companies/haas). Over the corpus period (2000-10-20 to 2001-12-21), Tj sent 38 and received 45 emails, totalling 83 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dasovich](people/dasovich-haas) (17), [Eveningmba](people/eveningmba-haas) (15), [Kannan](people/kannan-haas) (6), [Kelly](people/kelly-haas) (6), [Kiem](people/kiem-haas) (6).
